case_title: VELASQUEZ RODOLFO VS AMERICAN POSTAL WORKERS UNION

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT AMERICAN POSTAL WORKERS UNION STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION RECONSIDERATION BASED ON ERROR IN LAW CONTINUED FROM JAN-12-1994 TO JAN-14-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 03

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF VELASQUEZ RODOLFO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT AMERICAN POSTAL WORKERS UNION $3,616.00 PRINCIPAL, $65.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,681.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION RECONSIDERATION BASED ON ERROR IN LAW OF JAN-14-1994, GRANTED
CORRESP. RECEIVED FROM RODOLFO VELASQUEZ AND SENT TO JUDGE KOSSOW.
